title: Hetaeria occulta
intro: Hetaeria occulta, also known as the hidden Hetaeria, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Hetaeria occulta include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Hetaeria occulta is often used to prepare infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health conditions.
taxonomy: Hetaeria occulta is classified as a type of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the subfamily Orchidoideae. More specifically, it falls under the genus Hetaeria and the section Hetaeria. Within the Orchidaceae family, Hetaeria occulta is further classified as a terrestrial orchid. This classification places it among the many diverse and widespread orchid species.
